rxdelay RECODE : Last 6 mths, delayed filling rx meds because of cost YNA 
cnd_heartattack RECODE : Dr ever said had: heart attack YNA

cnd_cancer RECODE : Dr ever said had: cancer, other than skin cancer YNA 
cnd_copd RECODE : Dr ever said had: emphysema, asthma or copd YNA 
cnd_diabetes RECODE : Dr ever said had: diabetes or high blood
